transcript: Speaker A: Stop saying "I am fine", "thank you", "I don't know", "you are welcome". Ye bahut basic English hai. Pehle main bhi aise hi English bolti thi. Phir maine MySivi pe practice karna shuru kiya. [Stop saying "I am fine", "thank you", "I don't know", "you are welcome". This is very basic English. Earlier, I also used to speak English like this. Then I started practicing on MySivi.] Speaker B: What is your name? Speaker A: My name is Neha. Speaker B: How old are you? Speaker A: I have 22. Speaker B: "I have 22" nahi, "I am 22 years old" hota hai. [Not "I have 22", it is "I am 22 years old".] Speaker A: Okay okay, I am 22 years old. Speaker B: Where are you from? Speaker A: I am Uttar Pradesh. Speaker B: "I am Uttar Pradesh" nahi, "I am from Uttar Pradesh" hoga. [Not "I am Uttar Pradesh", it will be "I am from Uttar Pradesh".] Speaker A: Thik hai, thik hai. Mujhe English acche se nahi aati. [Okay, okay. I don't know English very well.] Speaker B: Koi problem nahi. AI teacher ke sath try kiya? [No problem. Did you try with an AI teacher?] Speaker A: Wo toh mehenge hote honge na? [They must be expensive, right?] Speaker B: Bilkul nahi. Normal English classes se 7 guna sasta hai. Isliye 50 lakh log MySivi par English practice kar rahe hain. [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing English on MySivi.] Speaker A: Par time nahi milta. [But I don't get time.] Speaker B: Roz sirf 15 se 20 minute ki practice kaafi hai. Bilkul confident ho jaogi. [Just 15 to 20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.] Speaker A: Kaise join karu? [How do I join?] Speaker B: Ye install ka button dabao aur MySivi app install karo. Sirf 15 dinon mein tumhe improvements dikhne lagegi. Chalo, shuru ho jao. [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. You will start seeing improvements in just 15 days. Come on, get started.]
on_screen_text: Stop Saying; I am fine X; thank you X; I don't know X; You are welcome X; Ye bahut basic english hai [This is very basic English]; Pehle mai bhi aise hi english bolti thi [Earlier I also used to speak English like this]; phir maine MySivi par practice karna shuru kiya [then I started practicing on MySivi]; what is your name?; My name is Neha. Yes; How old are you?; I have 22 X; I am 22 years old Yes; Where are you from?; I am Uttar Pradesh X; I am from Uttar Pradesh Yes; Mujhe English acche se nahi aati [I don't know English well]; MySivi; Wo toh mehenge hote honge na [They must be expensive, right]; Normal English classes se 7 guna sasta [7 times cheaper than normal English classes]; Isliye 50 lakh log MySivi par English practice kar rahe hain [That's why 50 lakh people are practicing English on MySivi]; Par time nahi milta [But I don't get time]; Rojh sirf 15 se 20 minute ki practice [Just 15 to 20 minutes of practice daily]; Bilkul confident ho jayegi [Will become completely confident]; Kaise join karu [How to join]; install karo [install it]; Sirf 15 dinon mein [In just 15 days]; dikhne lagegi [will start showing]
summary: A young woman demonstrates how she improved her English using the MySivi AI app. Through a split-screen simulation, an AI robot corrects her grammatical mistakes in real-time. The ad highlights that the app is 7 times cheaper than traditional classes and encourages users to install it to see results in 15 days.
